message:
Add LogLevel config for Dolt server (GT_DOLT_LOGLEVEL env var)

Per Tim Sehn (Dolt CEO): loglevel=debug shows query execution details
useful for diagnosing slow queries. Configurable via GT_DOLT_LOGLEVEL
environment variable or Config.LogLevel field. Defaults to Dolt default
(info) when not set.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
